texto: And I am not one of these long-living fictional characters who prays for death as a release from the captivity of eternal life
autor: not for me the endless whining and wailing of the undead.
explicacao: Citação de not for me the endless whining and wailing of the undead. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “And I am not one of these long-living fictional characters who prays for death as a release from …” articula vida, john-boyne, the-thief-of-time em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e the-thief-of-time.
